title: Regression during compilation of Verilated output - "invalid use of non-static data member"
body:
During compilation of the Verilated RTL:

```
./Vaerial_wrap_pf__03a__03abrshift_c__P6__Vclpkg__0.cpp:220:49: error: invalid use of non-static data member '__Vlvbound_hdb1999c9__0'
  220 |         Vaerial_wrap_pf__03a__03abrshift_c__P6::__Vlvbound_hdb1999c9__0 
      |         ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
./Vaerial_wrap_pf__03a__03abrshift_c__P6__Vclpkg__0.cpp:224:99: error: invalid use of non-static data member '__Vlvbound_hdb1999c9__0'
  224 |                      & (IData)(outb)) | (0x3fU & ((IData)(Vaerial_wrap_pf__03a__03abrshift_c__P6::__Vlvbound_hdb1999c9__0) 
      |                                                           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

```
By hand editing the output and declaring '`__Vlvbound_hdb1999c9__0`' locally it builds (and test regression passes).

  ```
  // EOM
     CData/*0:0*/ __Vlvbound_hdb1999c9__0;
     __Vlvbound_hdb1999c9__0 = 0;


            outb = (((~ ((IData)(1U) << (7U & i))) 
                     //& (IData)(outb)) | (0x3fU & ((IData)(Vaerial_wrap_pf__03a__03abrshift_c__P6::__Vlvbound_hdb1999c9__0) 
		     & (IData)(outb)) | (0x3fU & ((IData)(__Vlvbound_hdb1999c9__0)


        // EOM
	//Vaerial_wrap_pf__03a__03abrshift_c__P6::__Vlvbound_hdb1999c9__0 
	__Vlvbound_hdb1999c9__0
            = __Vfunc_ohm__0__Vfuncout;
```

Compiler version (unchanged):
```
verilator % /usr/bin/clang++ --version
Apple clang version 17.0.0 (clang-1700.0.13.5)
Target: arm64-apple-darwin24.6.0
Thread model: posix
InstalledDir: /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin
```

```
verilator % verilator --version
Verilator 5.043 devel rev v5.042-27-geafad9742
```

Function source (of course this is used in many places parameterized):

   ```
virtual class brshift_c #(parameter p_width=4);
      static function logic[p_width-1:0] brshift(
         input logic[p_width-1:0] inb
         ,input logic[p_width-1:0] sel
      );
         logic [p_width-1:0][p_width-1:0] bus_array;
         logic [p_width-1:0] outb;
         integer i, j;

         assert(p_width>1);

         for(i=0; i<p_width; i++) begin : gen_outer
            for(j=0; j<p_width; j++) begin : gen_inner
               bus_array[i][j] = inb[  ((i+j)>=p_width) ? (i+j)-p_width : (i+j) ];
            end
         end

         for(i=0; i<p_width; i++) begin : gen_bit_mux
            outb[i] = ohm_c#(p_width)::ohm(sel, bus_array[i]);
         end

         brshift = outb;
      endfunction
   endclass
```

Thanks,
-e-
